questionHtml:
Two forces act on an object in different directions. The magnitudes of the forces are 18 N and 27 N. The mass of the object is 9.0 kg. What is a possible value for the acceleration of the object?

A. 0 m s−2

B. 0.5 m s−2

C. 2.0 m s−2

D. 6.0 m s−2

meta.title: Two forces act on an object in different directions. The magnitudes of the forces are 18 N and 27 N. The mass of the object is 9.0 kg. What is a possible value for the acceleration
